title: elymus lolioides
intro: Elymus lolioides, also known as wild ryegrass, is a perennial grass native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Elymus lolioides include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, Elymus lolioides is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese patent medicines to promote overall well-being.
